webpage_section.section_description: Inner wrapper div containing the card list

difference_1.computed_style_change: display: grid vs block; grid-template-columns: 368px 368px 368px vs none; column-gap: 16px vs normal
difference_1.difference: The card list uses CSS Grid layout in the original with three 368px columns and 16px gaps. The migrated version uses block display with no grid structure, resulting in a different card arrangement.

difference_2.computed_style_change: display: flex vs block; border-radius: 8px vs 0px; background-color: rgb(251,177,117) vs transparent
difference_2.difference: The first card has vertical flex layout with rounded corners and orange background in the original. The migrated version has no rounded corners and transparent background.

difference_3.difference: Missing top padding in the first card's text area.

difference_4.computed_style_change: display: flex vs block; border-radius: 8px vs 0px
difference_4.difference: The second card has vertical flex layout with rounded corners in the original. The migrated version has block display and no rounded corners.

difference_5.difference: Missing top padding in the second card's text area.
